ai_assistant.agents.empty.description: Declare agents inside `packages/<module>/src/modules/<module>/ai-agents.ts`, run `yarn generate`, and ensure the caller holds the agent's required features.

ai_assistant.agents.empty.title: No AI agents are registered for your role yet.
ai_assistant.agents.mutation_policy.clea: Mutation policy override cleared; agent is using its code-declared policy.
ai_assistant.agents.mutation_policy.erro: Cannot upgrade beyond the agent's declared policy — this is a code-level change.
ai_assistant.agents.mutation_policy.esca: Cannot be set above the agent's declared policy — this is a code-level change.
ai_assistant.agents.mutation_policy.noti: Overrides can only make the policy more restrictive. Options more permissive than the code-declared policy are disabled and rejected server-side.
Downgrade only — escalation is a code change
ai_assistant.agents.mutation_policy.opti: Writes allowed; destructive ones require confirmation.
No writes — agent cannot call mutation tools.
ai_assistant.agents.mutation_policy.subt: Downgrade this agent's mutation capability per tenant. Upgrading beyond the code-declared policy is blocked by the server.
ai_assistant.agents.override.errors.rese: Prompt overrides cannot modify policy fields (mutationPolicy, readOnly, allowedTools, acceptedMediaTypes). Remove those sections and retry.
ai_assistant.agents.override.history.emp: No prompt overrides have been saved for this agent yet.
ai_assistant.agents.override.history.sub: Newest first. Each save creates a new version scoped to the current tenant.
ai_assistant.agents.override.noticeBody: Overrides append to the built-in sections — they never remove or replace shipped text. Saved versions are tenant-scoped and auditable from the history panel below.
ai_assistant.agents.prompt.defaultModeLa: Default — shipped with the agent definition.
ai_assistant.agents.prompt.defaultSectio: No default copy declared for this section — the agent ships a single systemPrompt. Override to append additional text below the built-in content.
ai_assistant.agents.prompt.noticeBody: Overrides append to the built-in sections — they never remove or replace shipped text. Saved versions are tenant-scoped and auditable from the history panel below.
ai_assistant.agents.prompt.overrideModeL: Override mode — appends to the built-in section text.
ai_assistant.agents.prompt.overridePlace: Write additional text for this section...
ai_assistant.agents.prompt.subtitle: Toggle any section to write an additive override. Saving stores a new tenant-scoped version; built-in section text is always preserved.
ai_assistant.agents.prompt.title: Prompt sections
ai_assistant.agents.subtitle: Inspect every registered agent and manage tenant-scoped additive prompt-section overrides.
